name: Hosico
description: Born from a distant star, with eyes as deep as the ocean, Hosico is a small orange cat — a guardian of lost dreams. Guided by the light within him, he sails across faraway skies and misty worlds, gathering hopes the world has forgotten. In every place he visits, he listens for dreams left behind — too small, too fragile, or too stubborn to disappear. And with each dream he saves, the star on his chest shines a little brighter, reminding us that when you shoot for the stars, even the tiniest light can find its way home.
